title: TOPZEA 45 Pcs Tiny Spell Jars, Colored Mini Glass Cork Bottles Decorative Square Cute Wishing Bottles Little Glass Vials With Corks Stoppers for Party Favor, DIY Crafts, Halloween Decor
description:
About this item
The little square cork bottles are multi-functional, you can write your good wishes on pieces of small paper, and put them into the bottle as message bottles, also great as wishing bottles, mini treasure bottles, perfume samples bottles, cosplay props, endless possibilities!
The mini glass spell jars with corks lids are also adorable decorations for fairy gardens, fairy tea party table, dollhouse, witch costume party and other miniature art landscape. They are great additions to coffee bar, table centerpiece, Halloween party.
The overall size of the cute tinted glass bottle is approx: 0.9 x 0.5 inch/ 2.3 x 1.3 cm, capacity: 2 ml, the opening mouth: 0.2 inch/ 5 mm, (please check the size before purchasing), fit for holding dried flowers, sands, essential oils, spice, perfume, sprinkles, etc. The corks come out and go in easily.
The cute wishing bottles with lids are made of premium glass, which is well-made, delicate, cute. They will be fun party favor for wedding, baby shower, birthday, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, etc.
Package includes 45 pcs TOPZEA mini drifting bottles, come with 9 different colors: pink, purple, blue, transparent, amber, yellow, black, green, dark green, 5 pieces of each color, is equipped with some craft making kits, convenient to DIY crafts like jewelry making, the retro colors bring charming feeling to any party, the quantity can meet your various needs.
reviews_5s:
I love these tiny little bottles! The colors are accurate per the description and they feel very durable. Perfect for necklaces and mini apothecaries!THESE ARE SO CUTE IM OBSESSED! I don’t know what I’ll put in all of them yet but I will figure that out when the time is right. This was definitely a compulsive purchase and I have no regrets because they are my favorite thing I have ever bought on Amazon.

Packaging: they all came in one bag so they weren’t very protected, one chipped at the mouth but that’s all! I think because they are so small they are not likely to break as easily (as far as glass goes). Obviously if you were to drop one on a hard floor it could likely break.

I will definitely get more when I fill these up!Very happy with product!!!Perfect sizes and colors.I haven't used these yet, but I opened them to view them, and they're so cute! They are MUCH smaller than I imagined, so "tiny" is definitely an accurate descriptor. But since I wanted them for necklaces, they're absolutely perfect!I’ve enjoyed these crafty little bottles. The variety of colors enhance the magick inside these cute little charms for yourself & gifts.Great price, quality and productOmG these are freaking adorable! Better then I expected and I will be ordering more! Very nicely packaged in bubble wrap in the perfect size box.These will hold the tiny potions I am muddling for my miniature witches labThis set of tiny bottles is terrific! You get 5 each of 9 different colors plus the corks and screw eyes so you can turn them into pendants. All of my bottles arrived in-tact and they are perfect for tiny spell or charm bottles or pendants. There are so many different colors and you could use the color to correspond with your intention. This set would be excellent for someone who makes such items for sale. I think the price is very fair for the number of items you get. Would recommend.
reviews_1s: These bottles are cute but they are so tiny you can't even fit probably 1/4 tsp of anything in them. Not what I expected at all.They are cute to look at but you can't get any liquid into over half of the bottlesSuper disappointed my bottles never did arrive. I was so looking forward to them . Hopefully the seller gets back to me and I will get them they look adorable.
